item.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 Delivers 10x Token Efficiency Over Blackwell in First Tests
item.summary: CoreWeave has produced the first measured silicon benchmarks for NVIDIA's Vera Rubin NVL72, showing a 10x improvement in tokens per second per megawatt on DeepSeek-R1 compared to Blackwell — a vendor-stated result not yet independently replicated.
